creator: rgrimes@FreeBSD.org
text:
x86 was added as a directory installed by src/include/Makefile for archs i386 and amd64 but was not added to the mtree file.

Fix: Simple patch attached

Patch attached with submission follows:
How-To-Repeat: Clear /usr/include; cd /usr/src/include; make install  Notice that there is a /usr/include/x86 directory created, but it is not listed in the src/etc/mtree/BSD.include.dist file.
